column.text:
• The Toronto Blue Jays transferred LHP Joe Mantiply to the 60-day injured list due to left knee inflammation.
• The Minnesota Twins signed free agent RHP Hunter Gregory to a minor league contract.
• The Boston Red Sox placed 3B Nick Sogard on the 10-day injured list with a right oblique strain.
• The Los Angeles Angels transferred C Travis d'Arnaud to the 60-day injured list with right foot plantar fasciitis.
• The Los Angeles Angels signed free agent LHP Joey Lucchesi to a minor league contract.
• The Toronto Blue Jays sent C Alejandro Kirk on a rehab assignment to Dunedin Blue Jays.
• The Boston Red Sox signed free agent LHP Victor Aracena to a minor league contract.
• The Toronto Blue Jays sent RHP Yimi García on a rehab assignment to Dunedin Blue Jays.
• The Houston Astros sent RHP Cristian Javier on a rehab assignment to Corpus Christi Hooks.
• The San Diego Padres designated RF Nick Castellanos for assignment.
• The Cincinnati Reds activated RF Noelvi Marte.
• The San Francisco Giants placed LHP Matt Gage on the 15-day injured list with right knee inflammation.
• The San Diego Padres signed free agent OF Luis Sanchez to a minor league contract.
• The Milwaukee Brewers placed LHP Rob Zastryzny on the 15-day injured list due to a left trapezius strain.
• The New York Mets optioned RHP Jonah Tong to the Syracuse Mets.
• The New York Mets recalled RHP Joey Gerber from the Syracuse Mets.
• The Los Angeles Angels traded C Austin Wynns to the Atlanta Braves for cash considerations.
• The Tampa Bay Rays optioned RHP Trevor Martin to the Durham Bulls.
• The Boston Red Sox recalled 2B Anthony Seigler from the Worcester Red Sox.
